title: heliotropium gaubae
intro: Heliotropium gaubae, also known as the Persian heliotrope, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family that is native to Iran and other parts of the Middle East. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Heliotropium gaubae include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating skin conditions like acne and eczema. Heliotropium gaubae can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used topically in the form of a cream or ointment to treat skin conditions.
